CustomField.description: Use this field when the Derate % applicable for MR calculation differs from the Assembly Derate. If updated, the Effective Derate will be recalculated and applied to the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use this field when the Derate % applicable for MR calculation differs from the Assembly Derate. If updated, the Effective Derate will be recalculated and applied to the MR calculation.
CustomField.label: Override Derate
